chunks.text: College of Engineering EECS Instructional & Electronics Support Group 377 & 386 Cory, 333 Soda Lab Rules at ALL times _________________
at ALL times ______________________________________________________________________ 1) NO COMPUTER GAMES 2) NO FOOD or DRINKS 3) NO SCREEN LOCKS 4) NO MUSIC or AUDIO (except with hea

4) NO MUSIC or AUDIO (except with headphones) 5) NO PORNOGRAPHIC or offensive SCREEN DISPLAYS. 6) DO NOT REMOVE any hardware or printer paper. 7) DO NOT PRINT files if they are not for your coursework.

RINT files if they are not for your coursework. 8) Please treat other users with courtesy and respect. 9) Please read your account form for other rules of conduct. ___________________________________________________________

_____________________________________________________________ If another user offends you by violating these behaviors, please report it to us. You might first politely ask the user to stop. Users who do violate these rules cou
to stop. Users who do violate these rules could lose their accounts and may be subject to further prosecution. EECS Instructional & Electronics Support 377 & 386 Cory, 333
